meta_title: Thomas Laurent — Digital Project Manager / Business Analyst Candidate
meta_desc: Digital Project Manager / Business Analyst Candidate. Available for permanent or fixed-term roles: functional framing, web project management, IT coordination and change management.
hero_tag: Thomas Laurent — Digital Project Manager / Business Analyst Candidate
hero_typewriter_aria: Digital Project Manager, Business Analyst, Product Owner
hero_pitch: Available for a permanent or fixed-term role — I bridge business needs, IT teams and operational delivery.
hero_sub: Digital Project Manager  ·  Business Analysis  ·  Functional Analysis  ·  Digital Transformation
hero_ghost_aria: Contact Thomas Laurent about an opportunity
hero_recruiter: Goal: join a project team where I can secure project framing, streamline business / technical coordination and contribute to deliveries that are useful to users.
profile_intro: Business Analyst & Digital Project Manager — I work at the interface between business teams, technical teams and management.
profile_p1: Experienced on large-scale public-sector projects — Culture.gouv.fr redesign, modernization of the French Overseas National Archives, and maintenance management for a ministerial intranet — I handle both functional framing and operational delivery.
profile_p2: What sets me apart: genuine technical fluency. I understand Drupal architecture, can read an OpenAPI specification and challenge an analytics tagging plan. This dual culture makes me credible with delivery teams and effective in anticipating risks.
profile_p3: Today, I am looking for a permanent or fixed-term position as Digital Project Manager, Business Analyst or Product Owner, in a context where analytical rigour and documentation clarity truly make a difference.
profile_card1_text: Requirements gathering, user stories, business rules, specifications — I structure what is unclear.
profile_card2_text: Backlog, planning, reporting, committee facilitation — I keep projects on track in multi-project environments.
profile_card3_text: Web architecture, APIs, CMS, accessibility — I speak developers' language to manage delivery more effectively.
exp_card3_li1: Translating needs into actionable user stories
exp_card3_li2: Collaboration with dev and UX/UI teams
career_aside_text: Business Analyst / Digital Project Manager able to frame needs, translate business challenges into actionable deliverables, coordinate stakeholders and secure acceptance testing through to deployment.
tl1_org: Public sector · Institutional websites and intranet
tl1_li1: Management of high-visibility web projects: framing, planning, risk tracking and coordination of business / technical teams.
tl1_li2: Functional specification writing, workshop preparation, backlog prioritization and arbitration tracking.
tl1_li3: Test organization, defect qualification and deployment support.
tl2_li1: Gathering and formalizing requirements with business departments.
tl2_li2: Production of specifications, user stories, business rules and validation materials.
tl2_li3: Interface with developers, UX/UI teams, integrators and application managers.
tl3_li1: Coordination of redesigns, functional improvements and content publishing.
tl3_li2: Vendor follow-up, editorial and functional testing, user documentation.
tl3_li3: Contribution to continuous improvement of journeys and user experience.
proj1_desc: Migration of the HR ERP to a cloud solution for 2,000 employees. Coordination of 4 technical teams, business integration management and large-scale change management.
proj1_kpil: reduction in HR request processing time
proj2_desc: Design and deployment of a self-service portal for 15,000 active accounts. UX workshops, functional specifications, user acceptance testing and go-live in 6 months.
proj2_kpil: increase in online order conversion rate
proj3_desc: Support for an IT department transitioning to scaled agility. Migration of 3 teams to Scrum, SAFe framework deployment and training for 80 employees.
proj3_kpil: reduction in time-to-market for new features
contact_info_text: Available for a permanent or fixed-term position as digital project manager, business analyst or product owner. Open to hybrid, remote and discussions with recruiters / operational managers.
form_ph_subject: Business Analyst position, digital project manager…

form_success: ✓ Message sent. I will get back to you quickly.
privacy_p1: This portfolio site does not collect personal data without your explicit consent. Information submitted via the contact form is used only to reply to you and is not shared with any third party.
privacy_p2: By accepting analytics cookies, you allow the collection of anonymized browsing data through GDPR-compliant tools. This data does not personally identify you.
privacy_p3: You have the right to access, rectify and delete your data. To exercise this right, contact: contact@thomaslaurent.fr
privacy_p4: This site is hosted in France. No data transfer outside the European Union is performed.
cookie_text: Functional (necessary) and analytics (audience measurement) cookies may be set. Your choices are saved.
cookie_functional_text: Necessary for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookie_analytics_text: Help us understand your browsing and improve the site.
